text:
Market today:
Mixed signals for chips. Micron's AI boom is bullish, but Burry's bearish bet and Korean market volatility introduce caution. This creates uncertainty for your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings:
SOXL is deeply in the red (-28.7%) and trading below its default stop of 200. QQQI is flagged to TRIM (-1.86%). SPAL is a new, leveraged position already down (-9.58%), requiring close monitoring. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch:
Keep a close eye on the semiconductor sector's general sentiment, especially with the conflicting news around Micron. Also, monitor your leveraged positions closely for stop breaches.

Bottom line:
Focus on managing existing risk in your leveraged tech/chip holdings, given the mixed market signals.
plays: Your SOXL is deep in the red (-28.7%) and trading below its default stop of 200. Review your risk tolerance and consider reducing exposure or adjusting your stop to manage this leveraged position.
The scanner suggests trimming QQQI. Watch its stop at 52; a break below that level would be a signal to reduce this position.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The market signals on chips are mixed, and existing positions need attention.
